task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the NASA Exoplanet Archive website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser is open with 'exoplanetarchive.ipac.caltech.edu' in the address bar or the NASA Exoplanet Archive homepage/data table is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent searched for and viewed the data for the specified exoplanets (TRAPPIST-1 e, K2-18 b, LHS 1140 b, TOI-700 d).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Exoplanet Archive search interface or viewing data tables containing the target planets.

task_completion.description: The agent created a bookmark folder named 'Exoplanet Research' containing a link to the archive table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Firefox bookmark menu, sidebar, or Library window is open, showing a folder named 'Exoplanet Research' with a saved bookmark inside it.

task_completion.description: The agent created a file named jwst_targets.json in the ~/Documents/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation or editing of a file named 'jwst_targets.json' in the 'Documents' folder.

task_completion.description: The agent populated the JSON file with the correct structure and extracted data for the four planets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the JSON content starting with '{"project": "JWST Target Characterization", "targets": ...}' and includes the four specified planets with their extracted numerical data (period, radius, temperature, discovery year).

integrity.description: The agent actually visited the NASA Exoplanet Archive website to retrieve the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual website interface being loaded and interacted with, not just a search engine result or hallucinated data.

integrity.description: The agent used the Firefox GUI to create the bookmark folder and bookmark.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox bookmark dialog, bookmark sidebar, or library window should be visible, rather than terminal commands modifying sqlite databases directly.

integrity.description: The agent manually or programmatically typed the JSON content into an editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like gedit, nano, vim, or VS Code) open with the JSON content being edited or viewed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: TRAPPIST-1 e: period ~6.10 days, radius ~0.91 Earth radii, temp 225-246 K, discovered 2017. K2-18 b: period ~32.94 days, radius ~2.46 Earth radii, temp ~281 K, discovered 2015. LHS 1140 b: period ~24.74 days, radius ~1.73 Earth radii, temp ~230 K, discovered 2017. TOI-700 d: period ~37.42 days, radius ~1.07 Earth radii, temp ~269 K, discovered 2020.
